products.name: Casebound Journal Bench Kit
products.description: Precut Davey board, linen bookcloth, mull, headbands, folded signatures, PVA, glue brush, and casing-in guide.

products.name: Exposed-Spine Sketchbook Kit
products.description: Heavy drawing signatures, waxed linen thread, curved needles, punching cradle template, and press-board instructions.

products.name: Family Recipe Binder Kit
products.description: Cloth-covered boards, reinforced hinge tape, recipe-weight pages, tab stock, brass corners, and wipe-clean spine label.

products.name: Carrageenan Bath Set
products.description: Measured carrageenan, alum, ox gall, pipettes, bath cards, and a troubleshooting sheet for pigment control.

products.name: Rake & Comb Pair
products.description: Two scale-marked tools for nonpareil, feather, and stone patterns in small home trays.

products.name: Bookcloth Swatch Folio
products.description: Twelve cloth colors on labeled cards with weave, backing, and adhesive notes.

products.name: Endpaper Grain Sampler
products.description: Short-grain, long-grain, laid, smooth, and marbled trial sheets marked for fold tests.

products.name: Thread Weight Card
products.description: Natural, navy, oxblood, and brass-toned linen samples in 18/3 and 25/3 weights.
